summary: Data is growing due to new systems, tools, and integrations
Lack of governance leads to complexity instead of clarity
Importance of control over data ecosystem
analysis.pain_point: Data integration and governance issues leading to complexity
analysis.zetaris_relevance: Zetaris could help by providing a semantic layer to unify and govern data from multiple sources, reducing complexity

enterprise data governance.title: Most organisations only think about data governance when something goes wrong, such as incorrect reports, inconsistent numbers, or delays in decision-making.
